candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A box slides on a frictionless surface at an initial speed $v_0$ and sticks to a resting box with twice the mass. Two identical springs with spring constant $k$ attach the second box to a wall. If $m = 2\, \text{kg}$, $v_0 = 6\, \text{m/s}$, and $k = 300\, \text{N/m}$, calculate the oscillation amplitude of the mass-spring system after the collision.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个质量为 $m$ 的盒子以初速度 $V_0$ 在无摩擦表面上滑动,并与一个静止的质量为 $2m$ 的盒子粘在一起。后者通过两个相同的弹簧(弹簧常数为 $K$)与墙壁相连。已知 $m = 2\,\text{kg}$,\,$V_0 = 6\,\text{m/s}$,\,$K = 300\,\text{N/m}$,求碰撞后质量-弹簧系统的振幅。
metadata.explanation_zh:
振动的振幅是弹簧在动能完全转化为弹性势能时的最大位移。并联连接的弹簧等效弹性系数等于各个弹簧弹性系数之和。

$K_{\text{max}} = U_{\text{max}}$
$\frac{1}{2}mv_0^2 = \frac{1}{2}(k_1 + k_2)x_{\text{max}}^2$
$\frac{1}{2}mv_0^2 = \frac{1}{2}(2k)x_{\text{max}}^2$
$x_{\text{max}} = \sqrt{\frac{mv_0^2}{2k}}$
$x_{\text{max}} = \sqrt{\frac{(2\, \text{kg})(6\, \text{m/s})^2}{2(300\, \text{N/m})}} = 0.2\, \text{m}$

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question text clearly states the collision and spring setup, and the image cleanly confirms the moving mass, the 2M block, and the two springs attached to the wall. A human annotator can understand the intended numeric amplitude calculation.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
